_comment: Public Finance Data — Master Manifest. Fetch this file first. Compare versions to cached local copies to determine what needs refreshing.

rates_annual.description: TSP limits, IRMAA tiers, DIC rates, COLA values, IRA limits, SS bend points, pay cap, federal tax brackets
rates_annual.changelog_2026_1: Corrected tax bracket middle cutoffs (12%/22%/24%/32%/35%) for both single and MFJ per IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-32 Tables 1 and 3. 10 cutoff values corrected.

pay_tables.description: GS and DCIPS base pay tables — all grades, all steps, all OPM locality areas

plan_library.description: Pension plan parameters: VRS Plan 1/2/Hybrid, ERFC Legacy/Tier 1/Tier 2, FERS, other DB. Hire date auto-derive mapping. Plan combination stacking patterns.

state_benefits.description: State income tax treatment of federal retirement, property tax exemptions by state

static_refs.description: SS Full Retirement Age table, IRS RMD Uniform Lifetime Table, OPM locality area codes
